extract: Genesect (Japanese: ゲノセクト Genesect) is a dual-type Bug/Steel Mythical Pokémon introduced in Generation V. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Genesect has four other forms, which are activated by inserting a Drive in the cannon on its back. The Drive's light is visibly different depending on which one Genesect is holding, and it also changes the type of its signature move, Techno Blast. When it is not holding any Drive (referred to in Pokémon GO as its Normal form), the light is orange and Techno Blast is Normal-type. When it is holding the Douse Drive, the light turns blue and Techno Blast is Water-type. When it is holding the Shock Drive, the light turns yellow and Techno Blast is Electric-type. When it is holding the Burn Drive, the light turns red and Techno Blast is Fire-type. When it is holding the Chill Drive, the light turns white and Techno Blast is Ice-type. Genesect was leaked in the August issue of CoroCoro magazine on July 11, 2012, and it was officially revealed on July 14, 2012. It is the last Pokémon in both versions of the Unova Pokédex.
